body.title: Refactor CriticDevice to call EvaluatorCore(optimism=-1)
body.result: Refactored: CriticDevice.evaluate_decision() now calls EvaluatorCore(optimism=-1.0). evaluate_replay() routes through it. CriticAgent heuristic unchanged — E2E test passes. All critic wiring tests pass. Commit d0e2ce29.
body.intention: I intend that CriticDevice no longer maintains its own inference logic and instead calls EvaluatorCore with optimism=-1, keeping the same calling convention for DickSimnel's tool loop.
body.description:
CriticDevice maintains its own inference logic for evaluating builder decisions. After EvaluatorCore exists, this is redundant — Critic is EvaluatorCore at optimism=-1.

**HIGH-INERTIA PRE-APPROVAL (Akien, 2026-06-14):** devices/critic/ is wired into DickSimnel's tool loop. Refactoring it was explicitly approved in the design conversation for D-evaluator-consolidation-2026-06-14 before filing.

Refactor CriticDevice.evaluate_decision() to call EvaluatorCore(context=decision_context, optimism=-1.0). Keep the CriticDevice wrapper and its calling convention identical — DickSimnel's tool loop calls Critic the same way. Only the inference implementation changes.

Retire CriticAgent's direct inference calls. CriticJudgment output shape stays the same.

**Affected files:** devices/critic/device.py; devices/critic/agent.py (retire inference logic, keep output shape)
**Design rules:** no-autonomous-action; no SQLite; external-state; HIGH-inertia pre-approved
**Scope boundary:** IN: CriticDevice inference replaced by EvaluatorCore call; same output shape. OUT: changing DickSimnel wiring; changing CriticJudgment schema; changing when Critic is called.
**Completion criteria:**
  1. CriticDevice.evaluate_decision() returns same output shape as before
  2. devices/dicksimnel/test_end_to_end.py passes unchanged
  3. CriticAgent no longer makes direct inference calls — verified by removing its InferenceRequest import
  4. CriticDevice calls EvaluatorCore with optimism=-1.0 — verified by grep
